flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southside Virginia Community College rose 39% between 2006 and 2009 (22.8% → 31.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southside Virginia Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (56.3% → 70.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southside Virginia Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.8k).
